exp1_val_seed_select.protocol: nested inner split (30% val / 70% test within ngc_1039 eval universe)

exp2_ensemble.recipe: mean p_binary; threshold on inner val ΔF1

exp3_eval_protocol.note: High-prevalence (46%) makes ΔF1 vs all-positive baseline knife-edge; AUROC and Δ balanced accuracy are prevalence-invariant ranking metrics.
exp3_eval_protocol.recommendation: Use AUROC for ngc_1039 seed/model comparison; report ΔF1 @ t=0.5 as secondary.
